reason: Check must verify every acceptance criterion and the stated out-of-scope boundaries.
Check must validate the implementation matches the planned restore, eligibility, request lifecycle, and receipt semantics.
Check must verify the implementation keeps compaction as a managed lifecycle boundary without importing unnecessary reference complexity.
Check must compare the implementation against the Codex managed compaction lifecycle lessons without copying incompatible storage details.
Check must compare the implementation against Claude Code boundary/failure/resume lessons without importing unnecessary compact variants.
Check must ensure successful compaction commits records, segments, and active projection head according to the projection contract.
Check must verify session launch/eventing/delegate changes respect the session architecture.
Check must verify backend layering and repository/domain boundary consistency.
